usage: createPhysicalPin [-help] <pinName> [-allowOutsideBoundary] [-net <netName>] [-samePort] { { {-layer <layerName> } {-rect {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -polygon {x1 y1 x2 y2 ... xn yn}} } }

options.name: -allowOutsideBoundary
options.description: Do not check whether specified rect inside design boundary

options.name: -layer
options.description: specify layer which the pin is specified

options.name: -net
options.description: create physical pins on specific net

options.name: -polygon
options.description: specify the coordination of each vertex of the shape

options.name: -rect
options.description: specify the llx, lly, urx, ury coordinates of the rect shape

options.name: -samePort
options.description: create pin shapes on same port
